A prayer to mark the Centenary of Her Late Majesty Queen Elizabeth II

20 April 2026

A prayer to mark the Centenary of Her Late Majesty Queen Elizabeth II

The Church of England offers the following prayer to mark the Centenary of Her Late Majesty Queen Elizabeth II (1926-2022).

St George: Our Saint

18 April 2026

St George: Our Saint

Archbishop Stephen writes this week's Credo column in The Times.

Welcome from the Archbishop of York

I serve as the 98th Archbishop of York, supporting the Diocese of York and the dioceses of the Northern Province of the Church of England.

My priorities for the North

What is Faith in the North?

Faith in the North looks to encourage a movement of prayer, storytelling and church planting inspired by the Northern Saints.

Find out more

Pilgrimage

Pilgrimage is not simply a walk; it is following a route that many others have walked before, where they have encountered the Holy on route to a holy place

Learn more

Thy Kingdom Come

This year’s Thy Kingdom Come is all about the presence of God through His spirit. Join the global wave of prayer from 14-24 May 2026.

Join the global wave of prayer

Prayer for the Day

Sunday, 3 May 2026
The Fifth Sunday of Easter

Risen Christ,
your wounds declare your love for the world
and the wonder of your risen life:
give us compassion and courage
to risk ourselves for those we serve,
to the glory of God the Father.
Amen.

Get more prayer resources

Everyday Faith

Get the daily devotional app from the Church of England designed to inspire, equip and encourage you in your faith every day of the week.

Download the app

Safeguarding

The Church of England is committed to safeguarding as an integral part of its ministry and mission, promoting a safer culture and the welfare of every child, young person and adult.
